Variables.Name: NormalDistortionStrength
Variables.Description: Controls the strength of normals when distorting the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: PrefilterRoughnessY
Variables.Description: The vertical roughness value to prefilter the planar reflection texture with, useful for hiding low resolution.  Larger values have larger GPU cost.

Variables.Name: PrefilterRoughnessDistanceY
Variables.Description: The vertical distance at which the prefilter roughness value will be achieved.

Variables.Name: ScreenPercentage
Variables.Description: Downsample percent, can be used to reduce GPU time rendering the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: ExtraFOV
Variables.Description:
Additional FOV used when rendering to the reflection texture.  
	  This is useful when normal distortion is causing reads outside the reflection texture. 
	  Larger values increase rendering thread and GPU cost, as more objects and triangles have to be rendered into the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: DistanceFromPlaneFadeoutStart
Variables.Description: Receiving pixels at this distance from the reflection plane will begin to fade out the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: DistanceFromPlaneFadeoutEnd
Variables.Description: Receiving pixels at this distance from the reflection plane will have completely faded out the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: AngleFromPlaneFadeStart
Variables.Description: Receiving pixels whose normal is at this angle from the reflection plane will begin to fade out the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: AngleFromPlaneFadeEnd
Variables.Description: Receiving pixels whose normal is at this angle from the reflection plane will have completely faded out the planar reflection.

Variables.Name: bRenderSceneTwoSided
Variables.Description:
Whether to render the scene as two-sided, which can be useful to hide artifacts where normal distortion would read 'under' an object that has been clipped by the reflection plane. 
	  With this setting enabled, the backfaces of a mesh would be displayed in the clipped region instead of the background which is potentially a bright sky.
	  Be sure to add the water plane to HiddenActors if enabling this, as the water plane will now block the reflection.

Variables.Name: bBlurHorizontal
Variables.Description: Whether to blur along horizontal direction

Variables.Name: PrefilterRoughnessX
Variables.Description: The horizontal roughness value to prefilter the planar reflection texture with, useful for hiding low resolution.  Larger values have larger GPU cost.

Variables.Name: PrefilterRoughnessDistanceX
Variables.Description: The horizontal distance at which the prefilter roughness value will be achieved.

Variables.Name: NoReflectionShadow
Variables.Description: Do Not Render Shadow for PlanarRefelction
